dialogs.terra_entity.angler.0: I'm bummed out! There's probably been fish that have gone extinct before I even was born, and that's not fair!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.1: Whaaaat?! Can't you see I'm winding up fishing line??
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.2: There's no chefs in all of %s, so I have to cook all this fish myself!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.3: I don't have a mommy or a daddy, but I have a lot of fish! It's close enough!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.4: Let a kid give you some advice, never touch your tongue to an ice block! Wait, forget what I said, I totally want to see you do it!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.5: Ever heard of a barking fish?! I haven't, I'm just wondering if you did!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.6: Hey! Watch it! I'm setting up traps for my biggest prank ever! No one will see it coming! Don't you dare tell anyone!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.7: %s is filled to the brim with the most outlandish kinds of fish!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.stat.0: Did you know I have %s amazingly awesome fish now!? That's because as far as errand monkeys go, you're actually a bit useful!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.stat.1: Wooow! You've bothered me, like, %s times! If I didn't have a cool fish for each time, I would be really mad!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.task_finishe: I have enough fish! I don't need your help right now!
You have entertained me enough for today, go.
I don't have anything for you to do right now.
一Only one fish a day, please go away!
I haven't even used the last fish you gave me.  I don't need another.
You are done, the grand %s dismisses you!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.task_ready.0: Psst! I might have a job for you. Don't think you can say no, either!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.task_ready.1: I want a fish and you're going to find me one! Ask me about it!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.task_ready.2: %1$s wants YOU as the official %2$s errand monkey!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.task_ready.3: Hey! Just the sacrifi- I mean competent fishing master that I've been looking for!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.task_succeed: Oh! Thanks for the fish I asked for, now scram!
You make a great errand monkey! Now go away!
Muahahahahaha! You did it! You're still in one piece though, how boring!
Woah!? You actually did what I asked, and survived! Nice, hand it over and beat it!
Awesome catch! It's all going according to plan! He he he!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.wakeup.0: Thanks, I guess, for saving me or whatever. You'd be a great helper minion!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.wakeup.1: Wha? Who might you be? I totally wasn't just drowning or anything!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.wakeup.2: You saved me! You're awful nice, I could use you... er, I mean, totally hire you to do some awesome stuff for me!
dialogs.terra_entity.arms_dealer.0: Dude, get your hands off my gun!
dialogs.terra_entity.arms_dealer.1: Hey, bro, this isn't a movie. You need to prepare ammunition separately.
dialogs.terra_entity.arms_dealer.2: I see you're eyeing the Minishark... You can't even imagine how it's made.
dialogs.terra_entity.arms_dealer.3: I want to buy something from the Nurse. What did you say? She doesn't sell anything?
dialogs.terra_entity.arms_dealer.4: Flying Fish? I call it target practice!
dialogs.terra_entity.arms_dealer.5: Don't waste your time with the Demolitionist. I've got everything you need right here.
dialogs.terra_entity.clothier.0: Thanks again for freeing me from my curse. Felt like something jumped up and bit me.
dialogs.terra_entity.clothier.1: Mama always said I would make a great tailor.
dialogs.terra_entity.clothier.2: Life's like a box of clothes; you never know what you are gonna wear!
dialogs.terra_entity.clothier.3: Of course embroidery is hard! If it wasn't hard, no one would do it! That's what makes it great.
dialogs.terra_entity.clothier.4: I know everything they is to know about the clothierin' business.
dialogs.terra_entity.clothier.5: Being cursed was lonely, so I once made a friend out of leather. I named him Wilson.
dialogs.terra_entity.clothier.6: I keep having vague memories of tying up a woman and throwing her in a dungeon.
dialogs.terra_entity.demolitionist.0: Explosives are really popular nowadays. Buy some right away!
dialogs.terra_entity.demolitionist.1: Today is a great day to court death!
dialogs.terra_entity.demolitionist.2: Let me see what happens if I do this... (BOOM!)... Oh, sorry, did you still need that leg?
dialogs.terra_entity.demolitionist.3: Take a look at my goods; they're all at amazing prices.
dialogs.terra_entity.demolitionist.4: Dynamite, this is my special panacea prepared just for you. It can cure all kinds of problems.
dialogs.terra_entity.demolitionist.5: Want to get through those evil stones, huh? Why not just blow them up with explosives!
dialogs.terra_entity.dryad.0: Stay safe! Both worlds need you!
dialogs.terra_entity.dryad.1: The hourglass of time is slowly running out. And you're not aging gracefully.
dialogs.terra_entity.dryad.2: Two goblins walked into a bar, and one of them said to the other: 'A glass of beer?'
dialogs.terra_entity.dryad.3: What does it mean by saying I'm all talk and no action?
dialogs.terra_entity.dryad.4: You must stop the spread of evil.
dialogs.terra_entity.dryad.5: This world is much vaster... And the power of nature is stronger too.
dialogs.terra_entity.dye_trader.0: I bring you the richest colors in exchange for your wealth.
dialogs.terra_entity.dye_trader.1: Honey, your clothes are so monotonous. You really have to learn how to dye your dull clothes!
dialogs.terra_entity.dye_trader.2: The only wood I'm willing to dye is mahogany. Dyeing any other wood is a waste.
dialogs.terra_entity.dye_trader.3: Oh, no, no, that won't do. Even if you have money, you have to trade me with rare plant samples!
dialogs.terra_entity.dye_trader.4: These dye bottles? Sorry, my dear friend, these are not for sale. I only accept the rarest plants in exchange for them!
dialogs.terra_entity.dye_trader.5: You think you can fool my eyes? I don't think so! I only accept the rarest flowers in exchange for these special bottles.
dialogs.terra_entity.female_angler.0: What a pity! Some fish may have disappeared even before I was born. I hope we can protect the remaining ones well~
dialogs.terra_entity.female_angler.1: Ah... I'm so sorry! Did I disturb you while reeling in my line? I really apologize!
dialogs.terra_entity.female_angler.2: Although there's no chef in the whole %s, being able to cook fish with my own hands is a kind of happiness!
dialogs.terra_entity.female_angler.3: I don't have a mom or dad, but I have so many lovely fish to keep me company! I'm already very content~
dialogs.terra_entity.female_angler.4: Take my advice, sweetie~ Never touch ice cubes with your tongue! You'll get frostbite, so make sure to take good care of yourself!
dialogs.terra_entity.female_angler.5: Have you ever heard of fish that can make sounds? I think I've seen some before! Would you like to talk about it with me?
dialogs.terra_entity.female_angler.6: Oh dear! Be careful~ I set up some little decorations, not traps! I just wanted to give everyone a small surprise, please don't misunderstand~
dialogs.terra_entity.female_angler.7: The %s is full of lovely and unique fish everywhere! It's truly wonderful!
You know what? I've already collected %s beautiful fish! Thank you so much—I could never have done it without your help!
Oh no! I've bothered you %s times already, I'm so terribly sorry! But every time I get to see such beautiful fish, it makes me so happy!
dialogs.terra_entity.female_angler.task_: I have enough fish now! Thank you so much for all your help—you've done so much for me~
Thank you so much for today! I had such a lovely time with you! Go take care of your own things now~
I don't have any errands for you right now, but thank you so much for stopping by anyway~
I have enough fish for today—you've worked hard! Take care, and goodbye for now~
I still have the fish you gave me last time safely stored away. I don't need more for now, but thank you so much all the same!
Thank you so much! Having a helper like you is such a blessing to %s~
Hello there~ I have a tiny favor to ask. Could you help me if you're free? It's absolutely fine if you're not!
I'm looking for a special kind of fish. It would mean the world to me if you'd help find it! No rush at all—let's take our time to go over the details~
%1$s would like to formally invite you to become %2$s's fishing helper! Would you accept?
Hello! You must be the amazing fishing master I've been looking for! Could I ask for your help, please?
Wow! Thank you for catching the fish I wanted—thank you so much! You must be tired, take it easy~
You did an absolutely wonderful job! You've worked hard—go rest for a bit~
I'm so happy! You finished safely, that's such a relief! I was worried about you the whole time!
Oh my goodness! You not only completed the task but also came back safe and sound—you're incredible! Please hand me the fish, and go get some rest~
We got it! Everything went perfectly~ Thank you for your help, I really appreciate it!
dialogs.terra_entity.female_angler.wakeu: Thank you so much! I really don't know how to repay you—you're an amazing friend!
Oh! It's you~ I just slipped a moment ago, I wasn't drowning! Thank you for caring so much！
Thank you for saving me! You're such a kind person~ If you don't mind, I'd like to ask you to help me with a small errand—but it's totally fine if you don't want to!
dialogs.terra_entity.goblin_tinkerer.0: Goblins get angry so easily. In fact, they can start a war over some rags!
dialogs.terra_entity.goblin_tinkerer.1: To be honest, most goblins aren't real rocket scientists. Well, some of them are.
dialogs.terra_entity.goblin_tinkerer.2: Do you know why everyone carries these spiky balls around? Because I don't.
dialogs.terra_entity.goblin_tinkerer.3: I've just finished my latest creation! This version won't explode violently even if you blow or suck on it really hard.
dialogs.terra_entity.goblin_tinkerer.4: Goblin thieves aren't very good at stealing. They can't even steal from an unlocked chest!
dialogs.terra_entity.goblin_tinkerer.5: Yo, I heard you like rockets and running shoes, so I added some rockets to your running shoes.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.0: My job is to offer suggestions for your upcoming tasks. I recommend that you come and talk to me whenever you encounter any difficulties.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.1: They said there would be someone to tell you how to survive in this place... Oh, wait a moment. That person is me.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.10: At night, stars are falling and spreading all over the world. They have extremely wide uses. If you see them, you must get them, because the stars will disappear after sunrise.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.11: No matter what is spreading wildly, you will realize that it's time to stop them.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.12: If you want to survive, you need to make weapons and build a house. First, cut down trees and collect wood.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.13: After you have a sword, you can try to collect some gel from slimes. Use wooden sticks and gel to make torches!
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.14: If you have some ores, you need to smelt them into ingots before you can use them to make items. This requires a furnace!
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.15: If you combine lenses on the altar, you may be able to find a way to summon a powerful monster. However, it's better to use it at night.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.2: You should stay at home at night. It's very dangerous to wander outside in the dark.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.3: In the Confluence world, you will obtain multiple times the treasure, but this also means taking on multiple times the risk.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.4: As far as I know, there are more humans in this world than in our original world.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.5: Sorry, sometimes I have to open the door.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.6: Those guys that can explode are more threatening than the average surface monsters!
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.7: The life mushrooms on the grass can sometimes save your life.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.8: There are Crystal Hearts underground, which can be used to increase your maximum health. You can use a pickaxe to break them.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.9: There is a lake with magical powers underground, and it's very rare.
dialogs.terra_entity.mechanic.0: Did you make sure your device was plugged in?
dialogs.terra_entity.mechanic.1: Oh, you know what this house needs? More blinking lights.
dialogs.terra_entity.mechanic.2: DON'T MOVE. I DROPPED MY CONTACT.
dialogs.terra_entity.mechanic.3: Thank you! Sooner or later, I'll end up like the other skeletons in the dungeon.
dialogs.terra_entity.mechanic.4: I don't quite remember what happened in there. Three, maybe four important things...
dialogs.terra_entity.mechanic.5: Oh yes, the Signal Adapter! It can connect the redstone here to the wires perfectly.
dialogs.terra_entity.merchant.0: Swords beat paper! Buy one right away.
dialogs.terra_entity.merchant.1: Do you want apples? Do you want carrots? Do you want pineapples? All we have are torches.
dialogs.terra_entity.merchant.2: Take a look at my dirt blocks; they're really earthy.
dialogs.terra_entity.merchant.3: You have no idea how much dirt blocks can sell for in other places.
dialogs.terra_entity.merchant.4: One day they will tell your legend... It's sure to be a good story.
dialogs.terra_entity.merchant.5: Kosh, kapleck Mog. Oh, sorry, that's Klingon, which means 'Buy or die.'
dialogs.terra_entity.nurse.0: I need to have a serious talk with the Guide. How many times a week do you get severely burned by lava exactly?
dialogs.terra_entity.nurse.1: See that old man wandering around the dungeon? He looks like he's in trouble.
dialogs.terra_entity.nurse.2: Hey, has the Arms Dealer ever mentioned going to see a doctor or something? Just asking.
dialogs.terra_entity.nurse.3: Got into trouble with the thugs again?
dialogs.terra_entity.nurse.4: Don't be such a child! I've seen worse.
dialogs.terra_entity.nurse.5: Did it hurt when you did that? Don't do that.
dialogs.terra_entity.old_man.0: I cannot let you enter until you free me of my curse.
dialogs.terra_entity.old_man.1: Stranger, do you possess the strength to defeat my master?
dialogs.terra_entity.old_man.2: Defeat my master, and I will grant you passage into the Dungeon.。
dialogs.terra_entity.old_man.3: Come back at night if you wish to enter.
dialogs.terra_entity.painter.0: I know the difference between turquoise and teal. But I'm not going to tell you.
dialogs.terra_entity.painter.1: The titanium white is all used up. Don't ask.
dialogs.terra_entity.painter.2: Try mixing pink and purple. It'll definitely work, I swear!
dialogs.terra_entity.painter.3: No, no, no... There are many kinds of gray! Don't make me start...
dialogs.terra_entity.painter.4: I hope it stops raining. The paint still hasn't dried. It would be a disaster if it rains!
dialogs.terra_entity.painter.5: I tried organizing a paintball war, but everyone just wanted food and decorations.
dialogs.terra_entity.party_girl.0: We have to talk. It's... it's about parties.
dialogs.terra_entity.party_girl.1: I can't decide what I like more: parties, or after-parties.
dialogs.terra_entity.party_girl.2: We should set up a blinkroot party, and we should also set up an after-party.
dialogs.terra_entity.party_girl.3: Put up a disco ball and then I'll show you how to party.
dialogs.terra_entity.party_girl.4: I went to Sweden once, they party hard, why aren't you like that?
dialogs.terra_entity.party_girl.5: My name's Party Girl but people call me party pooper. Yeah I don't know, it sounds cool though.
dialogs.terra_entity.party_girl.6: Do you party? Sometimes? Hm, okay then we can talk...
Hmm, you look like you could use an Angel Statue! They slice, and dice, and make everything nice!
I don't refund for "buyer's remorse..." Or for any other reason, really.
Buy now and get free shipping!
I sell wares from places that might not even exist!
You want two penny farthings!? Make it one and we have a deal.
Combination hookah and coffee maker! Also makes julienne fries!
Come and have a look! One pound fish! Very, very good! One pound fish!
If you're looking for junk, you've come to the wrong place.
A thrift shop?  No, I am only selling the highest quality items on the market.
dialogs.terra_entity.truffle.0: As if living underground wasn't bad enough, jerks like you come in while I'm sleeping and steal my children.
dialogs.terra_entity.truffle.1: I tried to lick myself the other day to see what the big deal was, everything started glowing blue.
dialogs.terra_entity.truffle.2: Everytime I see the color blue, it makes me depressed and lazy.
dialogs.terra_entity.truffle.3: You haven't seen any pigs around here have you? My brother lost his leg to one.
dialogs.terra_entity.truffle.4: I don't know the 'Truffle Shuffle,' so stop asking!
dialogs.terra_entity.truffle.5: There's been such a huge rumor that's being spread about me, 'If you can't beat him, eat him!'
dialogs.terra_entity.truffle.6: I feel there are more of my kind here...
dialogs.terra_entity.witch_doctor.0: Which doctor am I? The Witch Doctor am I.
dialogs.terra_entity.witch_doctor.1: Choose wisely, my commodities are volatile and my dark arts, mysterious.
dialogs.terra_entity.witch_doctor.2: The heart of magic is nature. The nature of hearts is magic.
dialogs.terra_entity.witch_doctor.3: I sense a kindred spirit in the Etherian Dark Mages. A pity they are our enemies, I would have liked to learn from them.
dialogs.terra_entity.wizard.0: Want me to pull a coin from behind your ear? No? Ok.
dialogs.terra_entity.wizard.1: Do you want some magic candy? No? Ok.
dialogs.terra_entity.wizard.2: I make a rather enchanting hot chocolate if you'd be inter...No? Ok.
dialogs.terra_entity.wizard.3: Are you here for a peek at my crystal ball?
dialogs.terra_entity.wizard.4: Ever wanted an enchanted ring that turns rocks into slimes? Well neither did I.
dialogs.terra_entity.wizard.5: Someone once told me friendship is magic. That's ridiculous. You can't turn people into frogs with friendship.
dialogs.terra_entity.wizard.6: I can see your future now... You will buy a lot of items from me!
dialogs.terra_entity.wizard.7: I once tried to bring an Angel Statue to life. It didn't do anything.
dialogs.terra_entity.zoologist.0: I collected critters like you once, then I took a cursed fox bite to the knee!
dialogs.terra_entity.zoologist.1: I may not know, like, a whole lot...but I can talk your head off about nature and critters and animals and wildlife and...
dialogs.terra_entity.zoologist.2: My older bro calls me a lycanthrope. It means I'm like, part animal or something. He'd know, though, because he spends all his time outside!
dialogs.terra_entity.zoologist.3: I love animals, like, a lot! I tried to pet this weird looking fox one time, he sooo bit me, and now I became like one! Rad!
dialogs.terra_entity.zoologist.4: Staahp pulling on my tail, bro, it's totally real, and like...totally hurts when you pull on it!
dialogs.terra_entity.zoologist.5: Oh, THESE ears? Haha, totes better to hear you with, my dear!
dialogs.terra_entity.zoologist.6: This one time, at critter camp, I woke up one morning and everything was torn apart! Like, wow, how did I sleep through THAT?!
dialogs.terra_entity.zoologist.7: Wow, like, I've never seen a full moon. For some reason, it's like I pass out every time one's around!
dialogs.terra_entity.zoologist.8: I have noooo idea how I got here, but it's mega rad.
enchantment.terra_entity.whip_sweep.desc: Chance to deal a wide area of damage
item.terra_entity.big_helmet_anger_bones: Big Helmet Anger Bones Spawn Egg
item.terra_entity.big_muscle_anger_bones: Big Muscle Anger Bones Spawn Egg
itemGroup.terraentity.title: Terra Entity
mood.terra_entity.angler.like.demolition: the Demolitionist actually knows what they're doing, unlike some OTHER people! I kinda like that!
mood.terra_entity.angler.like.party_girl: the Party Girl actually knows what they're doing, unlike some OTHER people! I kinda like that!
mood.terra_entity.arms_dealer.hate.demol: I'd REALLY like to use the Demolitionist as a range target sometime.
mood.terra_entity.arms_dealer.love.nurse: Think Nurse the Nurse ever, ya know, checks me out?
mood.terra_entity.clothier.dislike.nurse: For some reason, being around Nurse makes me feel uneasy.
mood.terra_entity.clothier.hate.mechanic: I hate Mechanic and I don't know why.
mood.terra_entity.clothier.love.truffle: Truffle? I hadn't seen anything so delicious in my life.
I wanna strap Arms Dealer to a rocket and watch what happens!
I wanna strap Goblin Tinkerer to a rocket and watch what happens!
mood.terra_entity.demolitionist.like.mec: Mechanic is a good friend I like, helps me load the gunpowder!
mood.terra_entity.dryad.dislike.angler: I don't like that Angler has no respect for other beings.
mood.terra_entity.dryad.like.female_angl: She catches those fish to better study nature and tries not to harm them. That's good.
mood.terra_entity.dryad.like.truffle: I like that Truffle resonates with every fiber of my being
mood.terra_entity.dryad.like.witch_docto: I like that Witch Doctor resonates with every fiber of my being
mood.terra_entity.dye_trader.like.arms_d: Arms Dealer has good eyes for vividness and business, I like it, yes?
mood.terra_entity.dye_trader.like.painte: Painter has good eyes for vividness and business, I like it, yes?
The Demolitionist is too noisy! No one comes to see my fish anymore!
The Party Girl always steals the spotlight at parties. No one notices my fish!
mood.terra_entity.goblin_tinkerer.dislik: I detect eerie vibes from <name of Clothier>, as if they contain dark secrets. I don't like the feeling.
mood.terra_entity.goblin_tinkerer.like.d: Dye Trader understands how fun it is to mix things together, I can respect that!
mood.terra_entity.goblin_tinkerer.love.m: Mechanic makes my cardiac core function improperly, it appears I love how that feels!
mood.terra_entity.guide.hate.painter: I hate that Painter is around. The world is fine the way it was made!
mood.terra_entity.guide.like.clothier: I'm quite fond of Clothier, we have a lot in common.
mood.terra_entity.guide.like.zoologist: I'm quite fond of Zoologist, we have a lot in common.
mood.terra_entity.mechanic.dislike.arms_: I don't really like that Arms Dealer won't leave me alone!
mood.terra_entity.mechanic.hate.clothier: I hate how Clothier doesn't know how to treat a woman!
mood.terra_entity.mechanic.love.goblin_t: Umm...Goblin Tinkerer makes my heart flutter, I need to get that checked!
mood.terra_entity.merchant.like.female_a: She may seem all looks, but she's actually quite nice!
mood.terra_entity.merchant.like.nurse: Nurse makes loads of money, I like deep pockets.
mood.terra_entity.nurse.dislike.dryad: I don't like Dryad that much, kinda weirds me out.
mood.terra_entity.nurse.dislike.party_gi: I don't like Party Girl that much, kinda weirds me out.
mood.terra_entity.nurse.hate.zoologist: Oh, I hate treating Zoologist , so difficult!
mood.terra_entity.nurse.like.wizard: Wizard is a smart and likeable goof.
mood.terra_entity.nurse.love.arms_dealer: What? Arms Dealer? I don't have a crush! I don't! Shut up!
mood.terra_entity.painter.dislike.truffl: Truffle is just too bland for my tastes, I dislike associating with dull types.
mood.terra_entity.painter.like.party_gir: Party Girl and I like the same shade of pink! That's a friend, in my book!
mood.terra_entity.painter.love.dryad: I would really love to paint Dryad... because of the vivid colors, of course!
mood.terra_entity.party_girl.dislike.mer: I think Merchant is a killjoy at parties.
mood.terra_entity.party_girl.love.wizard: I love that Wizard always dazzles at my parties.
mood.terra_entity.party_girl.love.zoolog: I love that Zoologist always dazzles at my parties.
mood.terra_entity.truffle.dislike.clothi: Clothier has tried to eat me so many times. I swear, one time they weren't even human! I, obviously, dislike it.
mood.terra_entity.truffle.hate.witch_doc: Witch Doctor has tried to throw me into a pot filled with other unusual ingredients. I hate that.
mood.terra_entity.truffle.like.dye_trade: Dryad treats me with respect, as though I'm a true part of nature. I don't know how to feel about that, except I like it.
mood.terra_entity.truffle.love.guide: I love Guide for being able to talk to me without mysteriously getting hungry.
mood.terra_entity.witch_doctor.dislike.n: I dislike the practices of the Nurse. True healing cannot come from metal and glass.
mood.terra_entity.witch_doctor.hate.truf: Fury fills my being as abominations sprout from tainted earth - I speak of the Truffle.
mood.terra_entity.witch_doctor.like.drya: the Dryad is a kindred spirit of nature, my soul is at peace in their presence.
mood.terra_entity.witch_doctor.like.guid: the Guide is a kindred spirit of nature, my soul is at peace in their presence.
mood.terra_entity.wizard.dislike.witch_d: Witch Doctor dabbles in things that shouldn't be disturbed, and I don't like that.
mood.terra_entity.wizard.like.merchant: Merchant and I share a very long history, I like the mutual wisdom.
mood.terra_entity.zoologist.dislike.angl: I don't like how cruel Angler is!
mood.terra_entity.zoologist.hate.arms_de: I really totally hate what Arms Dealer does to animals!
mood.terra_entity.zoologist.love.witch_d: I can't explain it. I have like, a thing for Witch Doctor. Is it because of the tail?
task.terra_entity.boomerang_attack.desc: Maid attacks enemies with a boomerang.
terra_entity.configuration.behavior_tree: Behavior Tree Web Viewer Server Port
terra_entity.configuration.chance_to_spa: Chance to Spawn Slime on Zombie Head
terra_entity.configuration.client.enable: Enable this option if you dislike spiders or want to beautify them.
